mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", warehouse_id as "warehouseId", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", user_id as "userId", saga_id as "sagaId", priority, fulfillment_type as "fulfillmentType", assigned_picker_id as "assignedPickerId", assigned_packer_id as "assignedPackerId", pick_started_at as "pickStartedAt", pick_completed_at as "pickCompletedAt", pack_started_at as "packStartedAt", pack_completed_at as "packCompletedAt", shipped_at as "shippedAt", delivered_at as "deliveredAt", cancelled_at as "cancelledAt", cancellation_reason as "cancellationReason", total_items as "totalItems", total_weight_grams as "totalWeightGrams", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", estimated_ship_date as "estimatedShipDate", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", notes, state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.fulfillment_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fulfillment_flat GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT line_item_id as "lineItemId", fulfillment_order_id as "fulfillmentOrderId", order_item_id as "orderItemId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", sku as "sku", quantity_ordered as "quantityOrdered", quantity_allocated as "quantityAllocated", quantity_picked as "quantityPicked", quantity_packed as "quantityPacked", quantity_shipped as "quantityShipped", quantity_short as "quantityShort", bin_location as "binLocation", item_status as "itemStatus", product_name as "productName", brand as "brand", weight_grams as "weightGrams", unit_price as "unitPrice", total_price as "totalPrice" FROM hm_query.fulfillment_line_items_flat WHERE fulfillment_order_id = #{fulfillmentId} ORDER BY bin_location, sku

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", warehouse_id as "warehouseId", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", priority, fulfillment_type as "fulfillmentType", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", total_items as "totalItems", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", estimated_ship_date as "estimatedShipDate", created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fulfillment_flat WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
